title: The Visionary Founder: Anshuman Singh of Scaler School
summary: Anshuman Singh founded Scaler school with a mission to revolutionize technology education. This educational video explores the innovative pedagogy, curriculum focus on practical skills over theoretical knowledge, and community impact that define his leadership.

sections.heading: Innovative Pedagogy in Technology Education
sections.body: Anshuman Singh champions hands-on learning to make complex concepts accessible. Scaler school's interactive lab sessions are where students apply theories, making education a dynamic experience.
key_points: Hands-on approach bridges theory and practice

sections.heading: Curriculum Focused on Practical Skills
sections.body: Scaler school's curriculum goes beyond textbooks, ensuring students develop a skill set needed in the real world. From coding to robotics competitions and internships with tech giants, Scaler is shaping industry-ready graduates.

sections.heading: Building a Tech Community
sections.body: Scaler school nurtures connections among peers and professionals, creating an ecosystem where students support each other's learning. Regular hackathons foster teamwork while guest lectures from industry leaders keep the curriculum cutting-edge.

key_facts: Scaler school graduates often secure positions in leading tech companies.
